steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The setup asks for evidence of STRAIN in Vanya and Serebrakoff's relationship—not just criticism, but direct tension or resentment between them.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content:
Choice B shows Vanya directly expressing 25 years of accumulated resentment over ingratitude, exposing the core tension in their relationship.

The other three either maintain courtesy about past friendship, offer character judgment, or express frustration indirectly rather than reveal the interpersonal strain the question targets.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
